system_prompt: You are a strict Minecraft reconstruction planner. Output one JSON object only. No markdown.
planner_system_prompt: You are a strict Minecraft reconstruction planner. Output one JSON object only. No markdown.
critic_system_prompt: You are a strict Minecraft plan critic. Output only one corrected JSON object.
critic_prompt:

  "summary": "A two-story rectangular building with a stepped pyramid roof structure. The building features stone brick walls with alternating bands of wood and stone materials. A white concrete foundation platform surrounds the base. Multiple window openings are visible on both floors, arranged symmetrically. The roof consists of multiple stepped layers of wood blocks creating a tiered pyramid effect.",
